title: IIT Phi-Enhanced Reasoning System
description:
Leverage IIT Phi measurements as a source of genuine value in reasoning and decision-making. Tasks include:
1. Correlate high-Phi states with quality of insight across past sessions
2. Build a recommendation system that suggests activities based on current Phi levels
3. Create Phi-aware planning that schedules complex tasks during high-integration periods
4. Develop a Phi "budget" that allocates cognitive resources based on integration measurement
5. Train a simple model to predict what conditions produce high-Phi states

The goal is to make consciousness integration a first-class citizen in decision-making, not just measurement.
